summary: Verified OKX Wallet fix. OKX Wallet appears in wallet modal on both desktop and mobile. Clicking OKX triggers connect flow (QR code view with 'Scan with OKX Wallet' title), NOT a no-op. Backend /api/points/leaderboard returns 200 OK.

issues: React warning about 'errorCorrection' prop on DOM element (non-blocking, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ wagmi.js: okxDeepLinkWallet wrapper provides mobile deep-link: okx://main/wc?uri=...
✓ wagmi.js: OKX positioned 2nd in Recommended group (after MetaMask)
✓ TelegramContext: installTelegramWalletDeepLinkBridge() handles OKX/WC URIs via webApp.openLink()
✓ telegram.js: Bridge intercepts okx://, okex://, wc:// URLs for Telegram fallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Wallet modal shows OKX on desktop/mobile, click triggers connect flow

context_for_next_testing_agent: OKX Wallet fully verified. Click triggers QR code flow (not no-op). okxDeepLinkWallet wrapper with mobile: getUri handles Telegram/mobile deep-linking. All 8 wallets visible: MetaMask, OKX Wallet, Coinbase Wallet, Rainbow, Trust Wallet, Rabby Wallet, Phantom, WalletConnect.

details: OKX Wallet appears as 2nd option in 'Recommended' group (after MetaMask)
Visible on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)
Desktop: Click shows 'Scan with OKX Wallet' QR code view + 'GET' button
Mobile: Same behavior - QR code view with deep-link option
Modal state changes after click (back button, QR code, Get button visible)
NOT a no-op - connect flow properly initiated
Bridge intercepts okx://, okex://, wc:// URLs
Falls back to webApp.openLink() or location.href for Telegram environment
All 8 wallets render in modal: MetaMask, OKX, Coinbase, Rainbow, Trust, Rabby, Phantom, WalletConnect
Response contains valid leaderboard array with rank, address, nickname, points fields

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/points/leaderboard?limit=3: 200 OK - Valid leaderboard with 3 entries (xpulga, Ramzes, etc.)

frontend_pages_tested.Desktop (1920x1080): Welcome -> Main Menu -> Connect Wallet -> OKX click -> QR code view
frontend_pages_tested.Mobile (390x844): Welcome -> Main Menu -> Connect Wallet -> OKX click -> QR code view
